title: Package update should not be executed without installing it
description: Package update should not be executed without installing itAnalyze your codeintentionality-efficientmaintainabilityCode SmellRunningupdateof your package manager in a singleRUNinstruction stores the cache index in the file system. This cache is not needed for the installed software to work properly.Why is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoLeaving unnecessary files in Docker image increases its size. The Docker images should be small and only contain necessary data.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Package index update should not be executed without installing packages. Running only cache/index update stores unnecessary cache files and increases image size. Combine with install in the same RUN instruction (e.g., 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y <packages>').
